black.text: I never leave home without ____.
What's that smell?
Life was beautiful until ____.
I'd buy that for ____.
TSA guidelines now prohibit ____ on airplanes.
What's my secret superpower?
Instead of coal, Santa now leaves ____ for naughty children.
Prove you're not a robot by selecting all ____ in the image.
Why did the hipster burn his tongue? He ate his ____ before it was cool.
What's the worst thing about the internet?
In the new Disney film, Cinderella's real power is ____.
I'm sorry officer, I didn't know the speed limit for ____ was so low.
Breaking news: ____ causes global warming.
The archaeological dig revealed that dinosaurs were actually ____ the whole time.
My therapist says I need to talk more about ____, but honestly I think we should avoid it.
That's not ____, that's ____.
It was a dark and stormy night when ____ and ____ fell in love.
The new trendy restaurant serves a fusion of ____ and ____ that nobody asked for.
At the exclusive gentleman's club, one could enjoy ____ while reading about ____.
The worst possible combination: ____ with a side of ____.

white: a house plant that judges you
the sound of a fork on a plate
a motivational poster in a prison
a room full of people on mute
a staring contest with a cat
the friend who brings potato salad
being read your rights at a convenience store
the narrator from a TrueTrue crime podcast
the sound of my own thoughts
an omen of things to come
the void staring back at me
